name: python3-incremental
title: python3-incremental
description:
Library for versioning Python projects
Incremental is a small library that versions your Python projects.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-incremental because Library for versioning Python projects.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-incremental as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-incremental with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-incremental --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
